docs.text: Lecture PDFs This page collects direct links to the compiled lecture-note PDFs. PDF links intentionally avoid third-party CDN URLs. The download links use GitHub raw files from the main branch, and the view links use GitHub's file viewer, so newly committed PDFs are available through GitHub directly.
